subcodes.first_line: Let these exalted words be thy love-song on the tree of Bahá, O thou most holy and resplendent Leaf
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایتها الورقه المبارکه النورآء غنی و تغنی علی افنان دوحه البهاء هذه الکلمه العلیا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
